scope: Source Scout / Event Trigger / Ingest Coordinator deterministic agents + transcripts_adapter worker wrapper.

agents.name: source_scout_agent
agents.behavior: Detects stale assets via expected_freshness_hours; returns candidate list.

agents.name: event_trigger_agent
agents.behavior: Wraps each stale candidate in an EventTriggerPacketV1.

agents.name: ingest_coordinator_agent
agents.behavior: Emits an IngestAlertPacketV1 + enqueues an ingest_queue job.

agents.name: ingest_queue_worker
agents.behavior: Delegates actual transcript fetch to an injectable TranscriptFetcher callable; writes a SourceArtifactPacketV1 on success.

coverage: missing provider defaults to empty list
worker success path writes SourceArtifactPacketV1 and marks alert done
worker failure path returns ok=False and leaves alert enqueued
